name: Country Baked Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Pick over the dried beans and rinse them under running water. Cover the beans with water in a large kettle. Bring to a boil; cover the kettle. Boil for 2 minutes, then remove from heat. Let stand for 1 hour. Pour into slow cooker.
2. Stuff onions with cloves and bury them deep in the beans. Stir in molasses, sugar, salt, and mustard. Cut the salt pork into 8 pieces and lay on top. Pour boiling water over just until it covers the beans; cover.
3. Cook on low for 10 hours or on high for 6 hours, or until beans are tender.
